subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! In these days when the peoples of the world are veiled by the most great veils and are occupied with the concerns of heedlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله در این ایام که اهل عالم بحجبات اعظم محتجب و بشئون غفلت مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement
